title: crotalaria brevipedunculata
intro: Crotalaria brevipedunculata, also known as short-stalked crotalaria, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. Crotalaria brevipedunculata is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or powder to be used in herbal remedies.
